00001| import { AIRDROP_CONFIG } from './config'
00002| import type { AirdropEligibility } from './types'
00003| import { formatUnits, parseUnits, createPublicClient, http } from 'viem'
00004| import { base } from 'viem/chains'
00005| 
00006| /**
00007|  * Check if a wallet is eligible for the airdrop using on-chain data
00008|  */
00009| export async function checkAirdropEligibility(
00010|   walletAddress: string
00011| ): Promise<AirdropEligibility> {
00012|   try {
00013|     // Create a public client for Base chain
00014|     const client = createPublicClient({
00015|       chain: base,
00016|       transport: http()
00017|     })
00018|     
00019|     // Get native token balance (ETH on Base)
00020|     const balance = await client.getBalance({
00021|       address: walletAddress as `0x${string}`
00022|     })
00023|     
00024|     const ethBalance = formatUnits(balance, 18)
00025|     
00026|     console.log('Checking eligibility:', {
00027|       address: walletAddress,
00028|       ethBalance,
00029|       minRequired: AIRDROP_CONFIG.eligibilityCriteria.minEthBalance
00030|     })
00031|     
00032|     // Check minimum ETH balance requirement
00033|     const minEthBalance = AIRDROP_CONFIG.eligibilityCriteria.minEthBalance || '0'
00034|     const hasMinBalance = parseFloat(ethBalance) >= parseFloat(minEthBalance)
00035|     
00036|     if (!hasMinBalance) {
00037|       return {
00038|         isEligible: false,
00039|         amount: '0',
00040|         amountFormatted: '0',
00041|         reason: `Minimum ${minEthBalance} ETH balance required. You have ${parseFloat(ethBalance).toFixed(4)} ETH`
00042|       }
00043|     }
00044|     
00045|     // Calculate airdrop amount based on ETH balance
00046|     // Example: 1000 tokens per 0.01 ETH (you can customize this formula)
00047|     const airdropAmount = calculateAirdropAmount(ethBalance)
00048|     
00049|     // Check if already claimed (if using claim contract)
00050|     if (AIRDROP_CONFIG.claimContractAddress) {
00051|       const hasClaimed = await checkIfClaimed(walletAddress)
00052|       if (hasClaimed) {
00053|         return {
00054|           isEligible: false,
00055|           amount: '0',
00056|           amountFormatted: '0',
00057|           reason: 'Airdrop already claimed',
00058|           alreadyClaimed: true
00059|         }
00060|       }
00061|     }
00062|     
00063|     return {
00064|       isEligible: true,
00065|       amount: airdropAmount,
00066|       amountFormatted: formatUnits(
00067|         parseUnits(airdropAmount, AIRDROP_CONFIG.tokenDecimals),
00068|         AIRDROP_CONFIG.tokenDecimals
00069|       ),
00070|       proof: undefined, // Will be populated if using Merkle tree
00071|     }
00072|   } catch (error) {
00073|     console.error('Error checking eligibility:', error)
00074|     return {
00075|       isEligible: false,
00076|       amount: '0',
00077|       amountFormatted: '0',
00078|       reason: 'Error checking eligibility. Please try again.'
00079|     }
00080|   }
00081| }
00082| 
00083| /**
00084|  * Calculate airdrop amount based on wallet balance
00085|  * Customize this formula based on your requirements
00086|  */
00087| function calculateAirdropAmount(ethBalance: string): string {
00088|   const balance = parseFloat(ethBalance)
00089|   
00090|   // Example tiered distribution:
00091|   // 0.01-0.1 ETH: 1000 tokens
00092|   // 0.1-1 ETH: 5000 tokens
00093|   // 1+ ETH: 10000 tokens
00094|   
00095|   if (balance >= 1) {
00096|     return '10000'
00097|   } else if (balance >= 0.1) {
00098|     return '5000'
00099|   } else if (balance >= 0.01) {
00100|     return '1000'
00101|   }
00102|   
00103|   return '0'
00104| }
